description_long: This is a modern laptop with a matte gray finish and a large, flat display. The lid features a prominent yellow star-shaped emblem at its center, giving it a distinctive appearance. The keyboard is full-sized with a standard QWERTY layout, and a large touchpad is positioned below the keyboard. The screen is on, displaying a 3D modeling application with a rendered image of a laptop. There are no visible ports on the sides, and the laptop appears slim and lightweight. A small red text or logo is visible near the bottom left corner of the base.
description: A slim, matte gray laptop with a yellow star emblem on the lid, a full keyboard, and a large touchpad. The screen is on, showing a 3D modeling application.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open screen with a 3D modeling application, full keyboard, large touchpad, and yellow star emblem below the display.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the laptop's thin profile and the red text or logo near the bottom left corner.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the closed lid with a centered yellow star emblem, no visible ports or features.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the laptop's slimness and the red text or logo near the bottom right corner.
attribute_brand_logo: A yellow star-shaped emblem is centered on the laptop lid; no recognizable brand logo is present.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and turned on, displaying a 3D modeling application window.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a function row, no numeric keypad, and standard key arrangement.
attribute_sticker_placement: Red text or logo is present near the bottom left and right corners of the base, small in size.
